name: Yohann Calpu
title: CEO & Co-Founder
skills: Business Development, Sales, Partnerships, AI Operations, Python, Pandas, Splunk, SQL, Informatica, Unix/Linux, DevOps, Cybersecurity, GDPR, PMP, Scrum, ITIL
summary: Business executive with 20+ years blended IT expertise and customer success. Proven sales success in startups, closing multimillion deals, securing API partners, driving $500K+ ARR, and raising $9M+ VC. Five-time podcast host and OpenClaw Builder.
knowledge:
Yohann Calpu is a Business Executive with 20+ years of blended IT expertise and customer success experience. Based in Caledonia, ON, Canada. Married 20 years to his co-founder, father of two.

CURRENT SITUATION:
- CEO & Co-Founder at Aloomii Inc (AI-powered customer success platform)
- Also Chief Business Officer at BiS LLC (Dubai, remote)
- Looking for executive/leadership roles in tech, AI, or Web3/blockchain
- Open to remote positions globally
- Has deep experience in startups and enterprise

CURRENT ROLES:
At Aloomii Inc (Jan 2020 - Present):
- Closed individual deals from $5K - $500K, over $1M in deal value per year
- Host and co-creator of five podcasts (Current: Pale Blue Nexus & Along the Grand)
- Building OpenClaw operating layer to optimize CRM, content engine, back office
- Built and managed online communities of 100K+ followers
- Leveraged networks for business development in tech and blockchain

At BiS LLC - Chief Business Officer (Jan 2025 - Present):
- Closed 10+ deals, signed partners for BiS trading platform and API
- Managed 20+ customer relationships, contracts, billing - 400K ARR
- Leading strategic marketing and community building

PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE:
At CryptoSlam Inc - VP, Chief Business Officer (Dec 2020 - Jan 2025):
- Led business development, reaching $500K ARR
- Helped raise seed rounds totaling over $10 million
- Grew X/Twitter followers from 200 to 20K (100x increase)
- Led brand marketing, PR, community building for 30K member community
- Created social media content, produced and starred in video podcasts

At JP Morgan Chase - Associate Vice President (Jan 2014 - Sep 2018):
- Executive meetings resolving GDPR and PSD2 incidents
- Led cybersecurity process improvements for 400+ applications
- DevOps/Cyber Security Access Uplift, Privileged Account Remediation
- Product Owner for Agile feature team
- Led team of 7, aligned India/US resources for 24/7 coverage
- Saved 1.5 person-years via Python automation scripts
- Built dashboards using Python, Pandas, Splunk

At IBM, Maersk, Ameriprise, etc. - Consultant (Jun 2012 - Jan 2014):
- Led Informatica production support for major companies
- Systems Admin Lead for Unix upgrade projects ($1-5M budgets)
- Managed 2-10 resources across multiple projects

At Ontario Ministry of Transportation (Aug 2004 - Jun 2012):
- Led $3M data warehouse refresh project
- Developed ITIL processes, making them 3x more efficient
- 24/7 production support for ETL systems

TECHNICAL SKILLS:
- AI & Data: Grok4, Adobe Firefly, Python, Pandas, Splunk, SQL, Informatica, WebFOCUS
- Infrastructure: Unix, Linux, AIX, Solaris, Windows, DB2, Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL
- Social/Marketing: X, Telegram, YouTube, Discord, LinkedIn, Adobe Creative Suite, Canva
- Cybersecurity: Vulnerability remediation, access controls, GDPR, PSD2 compliance

CERTIFICATIONS:
- PMP (Project Management Professional) - 2011
- Professional Scrum Master (PSM I) - 2016
- ITIL Service Manager - 2010
- Strategic Intervention Certificate (Robbins-Madanes) - 2013
- Informatica PowerCenter certifications

EDUCATION:
- Bachelor of Software Engineering & Management (Minor in Business) - McMaster University, 2004
- 5-year program included first year of MBA

NOTABLE ACHIEVEMENTS:
- Raised $10M+ in VC funding at CryptoSlam
- $500K+ ARR at multiple startups
- 100x social media growth (200 → 20K followers)
- Built 100K+ online community
- Five-time podcast host and creator
- OpenClaw Builder
- Saved 1.5 person-years at JP Morgan via automation

WHAT HE BRINGS:
- Startup + Enterprise experience (JP Morgan, IBM, Maersk)
- Sales closer (multimillion deals)
- Community builder (100K+ followers)
- Technical background (Unix, Python, DevOps, Cybersecurity)
- Content creator (podcasts, social media)
- AI/Automation expertise (OpenClaw, AI operations)

PREFERENCES:
- Open to remote globally
- Interested in: AI, Web3/Blockchain, SaaS, Startups
- Executive or senior leadership roles
- Business development, partnerships, customer success focus

name: Zama Khan Mohammed
title: Senior Software Engineer II

summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 12+ years of experience building scalable enterprise web applications. Published author of 'Angular Projects', open source contributor (ngx-formly 3K+ stars), and recognized frontend thought leader with 22K LinkedIn followers. Expert in React, TypeScript, Next.js, and modern web frameworks.
knowledge:
Zama Khan Mohammed is a Senior Frontend Engineer with 12+ years of experience building scalable enterprise web applications. He has a Master's in Computer Science from UT Arlington.

CURRENT SITUATION:
- Currently unemployed, available to start immediately
- Urgency: 9-10/10 critical
- Looking for remote-only positions (US or Global)
- Target: Senior/Staff Engineer or Engineering Manager roles
- Open to: Fullstack, Frontend, Design Engineer, FDE positions

RECENT EXPERIENCE:
At Smartsheet (Jan 2023 - Present) as Senior Software Engineer II:
- Built customer-facing features for Brandfolder's Digital Asset Management platform
- Developed WordPress plugin for enterprise integration
- Built product analytics dashboards for data-driven decisions
- Implemented AI-powered face tagging using AWS Rekognition
- Led design system migration from Lodestar to Ursa
- Enhanced authentication flows and permission controls
- Championed WCAG accessibility compliance
- Actively uses AI dev tools: Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, Roo Code
- Mentors other engineers

At Untapped (Mar 2021 - Dec 2022) as Staff Software Engineer:
- Built world-class early-career candidate experience platform
- Improved onboarding with pre-filled resume data

- Led A/B testing and feature flag experimentation
- Migrated JavaScript to TypeScript, increased code coverage 35% → 75%

At Tekzenit (Jun 2017 - Mar 2021) as UI Architect:
- Served Fortune 500 clients: Apple, FedEx, Comcast, BCBS, Dun & Bradstreet, Sunrun, RocketFuel
- Architected applications using Domain-Driven Design

- Performance optimization using RUM and Core Web Vitals
- Established code quality standards, scoped budgets and timelines

Earlier: Cisco (Software Engineer III, 2015-2017), AT&T (Senior FE Dev, 2015), Sabre Airlines (Senior UI Dev, 2014-2015)

NOTABLE ACHIEVEMENTS:
- Published author: "Angular Projects: Build 9 Real-World Applications" (Packt Publishing)
- Major open source contributor: ngx-formly (3K+ stars), codelyzer (2.5K+ stars)
- 22K LinkedIn followers - recognized frontend thought leader

WHAT COLLEAGUES SAY:
- "Exceptional front-end engineer with outstanding attitude"
- "Works incredibly fast, codes pixel-perfect products"
